vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

verify.value: All required features and interfaces are present.
verify.rule: All specified features must be represented in the geometry and part_tree.

verify.value: Estimated mass is 200g, within acceptable range.
verify.rule: The mass estimate must be a numeric value and within the design constraints.

verify.value: All P0 features are mapped to specific geometry operations.
verify.rule: Each required feature must be traceable to a specific geometry operation.

verify.value: All interfaces are reciprocal with neighboring subsystems.
verify.rule: Each interface must be reciprocal with its neighboring subsystems.

verify.value: All bolt holes have visible locking evidence.

risk.desc: Potential weak point at cooling inlet due to thin walls.
risk.mit: Increase wall thickness at cooling inlet.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to multiple interfaces.
risk.mit: Add alignment pins to key interfaces.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient cooling airflow due to design constraints.
risk.mit: Optimize cooling inlet design for better airflow.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure at wing spar attachment due to load.
risk.mit: Reinforce wing spar attachment area.

risk.desc: Risk of service access obstruction due to complex geometry.
risk.mit: Simplify service access areas.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment of spar_socket during assembly.
risk.mit: Implement visual alignment aids and verify alignment before bolting.

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance in battery access cutout.
risk.mit: Increase clearance to ensure easy access for battery replacement.

risk.desc: Thermal expansion may cause stress on anti_rotation_key.
risk.mit: Use flexible materials or design for thermal expansion.

risk.desc: Rib attachment may not be secure enough under load.
risk.mit: Reinforce rib attachment points with additional fasteners.

risk.desc: Carry_through fit may be too tight, causing assembly issues.
risk.mit: Adjust clearance to ensure smooth assembly without over-tightening.

physics_paths.path_description: Lift and drag loads from airfoil section transfer through spar to wing rib structure
Heat from solar exposure conducts through rib structure to leading and trailing edges for cooling
Control surfaces pivot about hinges, transferring motion to wingtip control surfaces

internal_feature_targets.feature_description: Socket for wing spar to transfer loads
Hole for wing skin snap fit
Pocket to reduce weight and improve stiffness
Sock for leading edge to improve aerodynamics
Taper for trailing edge to reduce drag
Cutout for control surface to allow movement
Line for hinge to connect control surface

integration_opportunities.opportunity_description: Socket can be designed to accept different types of spars
integration_opportunities.opportunity_implications: Allows for easier modification of spar material or design

integration_opportunities.opportunity_description: Hole can be designed to accept different types of skins
integration_opportunities.opportunity_implications: Allows for easier modification of skin material or design

integration_opportunities.opportunity_description: Pocket can be adjusted in size and shape
integration_opportunities.opportunity_implications: Allows for optimization of weight and stiffness

manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual inspection of spar socket and skin fit hole

verification_focus.focus_description: Socket must securely hold spar with no play
verification_focus.focus_implications: Failure could lead to structural failure of wing

verification_focus.focus_description: Hole must fit skin securely with no gaps
verification_focus.focus_implications: Failure could lead to air leakage and reduced aerodynamic performance

verification_focus.focus_description: Pocket must be accurately sized and shaped
verification_focus.focus_implications: Failure could lead to weight and stiffness issues

verify.value: Interfaces are named and connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature are chosen to match neighboring subsystems.
verify.rule: Reciprocal interface rule: name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate, and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature so the neighbor can declare the same joint family back.

risk.desc: Potential strain on servo due to improper harness routing.
risk.mit: Ensure harness routing through visible raceways or protected channels.

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage due to lack of strain relief.
risk.mit: Implement strain relief geometry at every cable exit.

risk.desc: Access cover removal may be difficult without proper geometry.
risk.mit: Ensure access cover geometry allows for easy removal.

risk.desc: Control horn actuation may be compromised if servo pocket is too tight.
risk.mit: Verify servo fits within pocket during integration.

risk.desc: Thermal dissipation may be insufficient if fins are too small.
risk.mit: Increase size of thermal dissipation fins if necessary.
